heroHeadline: Day 41: Fresh Israeli Strikes in Lebanon Threaten Ceasefire; US Auto-Registers Men for Draft Pool
heroSubtitle: Fresh Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon killing several people test the fragile US-Iran ceasefire framework, as a new US rule change auto-enrolls eligible men in Selective Service. Trump keeps military near Iran pending a 'real agreement.'
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-09. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal.
